book.label: Textbook
book.title: App Engineering as its own top-level area
book.intro: The book now gets its own page on the same level as Teaching, Research, and Software. That keeps the reference permanently visible and leaves room for later material, notes, and context.

teaching.label: Teaching
teaching.title: Courses with direct access to exercises and materials
teaching.intro: The current iteration adopts structure and content from the lectures wiki. Course pages should not just list links, but keep the most relevant working materials within immediate reach.

research.label: Research
research.title: Research themes that connect teaching and software
research.intro: This area will grow into an overview of research themes, project ideas, and entry points for theses. As a first step, the page is already prefilled with curated publication hits derived from Google Scholar.

researchPublicationsSection.label: Publications
researchPublicationsSection.title: Curated Scholar hits grouped by theme
researchPublicationsSection.intro: These entries are based on the currently discoverable Google Scholar hits for Robin Nunkesser. They are grouped by theme and link to the sources found there.

software.label: Software
software.title: Teaching software, open-source building blocks, and reusable packages
software.intro: This area collects the tools, apps, and libraries that emerge from teaching and research. The current companion work is the technical starting point for that layer.

areas.title: Teaching
areas.summary: Courses with dedicated subpages, exercises, slides, videos, and supporting materials.
